title: Saudia Pineapple Fluffy Delight
description: A sweet and savory dish combining the flavors of Saudia with the freshness of pineapple, all wrapped up in fluffy goodness.

ingredients.name: saudia spices
ingredients.notes: mix of cinnamon, cardamom, and ginger

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together fluffy pancake mix and Saudia spices.
2. Add in honey and mix until well combined.
3. Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
4. Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop pancake batter onto the pan.
5. Cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear on the surface.
6. Flip pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
7. Meanwhile, melt butter in a separate pan over medium heat.
8. Add cubed pineapple and cook for 2-3 minutes or until caramelized.
9. Serve fluffy pancakes with caramelized pineapple and a drizzle of honey.
10. Enjoy your Saudia Pineapple Fluffy Delight!
